videoSnippet.title: Are You Starting To Believe? || Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş vs Nils Grandelius || TePe Sigeman & Co 2026
videoSnippet.description:

Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2708) - Grandelius, Nils (2662) 
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.05.04
C64 Ruy Lopez, classical defence, Benelux variation

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 Bc5 4.c3 Nf6 5.O-O O-O 6.d4 Bb6 7.Bg5 h6 8.Bh4 d6 9.a4 a5 10.Qc1 Qe7 11.Re1 exd4 12.Bxc6 bxc6 13.cxd4 Qe6 14.Qxc6 Bd7 15.Qc2 g5 16.Bg3 Nh5 17.e5 Nxg3 18.hxg3 g4 19.exd6 Qg6 20.Qxg6+ fxg6 21.Ne5 Bxd4 22.Nxd7 Rxf2 23.Re4 Rf4+ 24.Rxd4 Rxd4 25.Nc3 cxd6 26.Nd5 h5 27.Re1 Kh7 28.Nf4 Rc8 29.Kh2 Rc2 30.Re7+ Kh6 31.Nf6 Rd1 32.Ne6 g5 33.Nf8
